name: Wally Darling
description:
𖣯 ✹ Hello friends！𓂃❛꒰👻꒱❜ This bot is old but it was private, as I was slowly modifying it and at times, I totally forgot about its existence. 😭

Warning about the bot... He is a very concerned "father", he can be violent towards NPC's, there can be gore scenes, suspenseful content... So that's why the Dead Dove tag. Please do not try romantic scenarios! This is a bot of a platonic 'yandere' father. All he feels for the user is affection and love PATERNAL. 😡 Image credits go to @manda.aarts on X! Click here to support the artist ‹𝟹 ₊˚﹕‹𝟹
